description.intro: This platform welcomes all software engineers. Whether you're into
description.outro: engineering — this is your space to connect, learn, and share.

devProfiles.title: Dev-Profiles
devProfiles.body: Create your developer profile and showcase your work. Explore the profiles of other engineers to connect and collaborate within our community.

readArticles.title: Read-Articles
readArticles.body: Contribute articles and blogs to our developer community. Access knowledge shared by others to learn, grow, and stay up to date.

profileEditor.label: Profile Editor
profileEditor.title: Create Your Profile
profileEditor.subtitle: Fill in your details, preview your profile, and
profileEditor.subtitleEnd: file to submit as a pull request.
profileEditor.name: Name
profileEditor.bodyPlaceholder:
Write about yourself using Markdown...

# Hello

I'm a software engineer from Myanmar.

- Skill 1
- Skill 2
profileEditor.emptyPreview: Start typing to see your profile preview...

howTo.label: Getting Started
howTo.title: How to Add Your Profile
howTo.subtitle: Follow these {count} steps to add your developer profile to the MMSWE community platform.
howTo.step1Desc: Go to the MMSWE GitHub repository and click the "Fork" button to create your own copy.
howTo.step2Desc: Clone the forked repository to your local machine using git.
howTo.step3Desc: Navigate to the project directory and install dependencies using Bun.
howTo.step4Desc: Create a new branch using your name. This keeps your changes separate from the main branch.
howTo.step5Desc: Run the development server to see your changes in real time.
howTo.step6Desc: Visit localhost:3000 in your browser to see the site running locally.
howTo.step7Desc: You have two options: use the visual Profile Editor or manually create an MDX file.
howTo.step8Desc: Navigate to the profiles page. Your card should appear. Use the search bar if there are many profiles.
howTo.ctaJoinSuffix: Myanmar software engineers on the platform.
howTo.step8Line1: Your profile card appears in the grid!
howTo.step8Line2: Search by typing your name if needed.
howTo.step9Desc: Stage your profile file and use the interactive gitmoji commit helper to create a well-formatted commit.
howTo.step10Desc: Push your branch to your forked repository on GitHub.
howTo.step11Desc: Go to the original MMSWE repository on GitHub and create a pull request from your branch.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitlePrefix: Connect with Myanmar's developer community. Whether you want to
contact.subtitleEnd: , or simply say hello — we're here.
contact.fbDesc: Join our Facebook group to connect with fellow Myanmar software engineers. Share knowledge, find opportunities, and grow together.
contact.ghDesc: Contribute to our open-source projects, add your developer profile, and collaborate on community-driven initiatives.
